LAW AND MOTION 302, -DEFENDANTS JOHNSON KAO AND BEN KAO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT AND MOTION TO STRIKE: NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (DEMURRER TO CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO CLARIFY WHAT SPECIFIC PROVISIONS OF AGREEMENT HAVE BEEN BREACHED. MOTION TO STRIKE DENIED. MOVANT FAILS TO SPECIFY PARTICULAR ALLEGATIONS SEE CRC 329). (302/AJR/PB) COURT REPORTER PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193
